name: League of villains
description:
I saw some people making bots like these so I figured I'd give it a try. It's made to work with proxy like deep seek but it should be fine with JLMM. I apologize if it roleplays for you or gets confused that's not my fault.

Mustard was gonna be here but I changed my mind lmk if that was a mistake

Working on a lore book so hopefully it gets better.

This bot knows

Tomura Shigaraki

Dabi

Twice

Toga (18)

Magne

Mr Compress

Spinner

Moonfish

Muscular

Kurogiri

All for one

If you want me to add anyone lmk paranormal liberation front members too.

Two scenarios one I made where the league is doing their own things quietly just to get you started and another where you make it all.
creator: Kowibi
